changelog.zh:
1.9:支持1.26.33

 libForceCloseOreUI 非依赖版本更新，config.json以及safe_mode重写
 增加自动将识别成功的特征码，写入特征码文件，并每次启动只用文件里的特征码
 防止两个重要文件损坏，或者是说结构不对，则会重新加载
changelog.en:
1.9:Support 1.26.33

 libForceCloseOreUI non-dependent version update, config.json and safe_mode rewrite
 Increase the feature code that is recognized successfully, write it to the feature code file automatically, and only use the feature code in the file for each startup
 Prevent the corruption of the two important files, or say that the structure is not right, then it will be Reload
